sql_array: CREATE TABLE requests (id INT PRIMARY KEY, req_payload VARCHAR(255));
SELECT BPEL.BPEL.getVariableData('request', 'req_payload', '/destRequest/city/text()') != 'Los Angeles' AS city_mismatch FROM requests;
CREATE TABLE cities (city_name VARCHAR(100), country_name VARCHAR(100), population INT);
INSERT INTO cities (city_name, country_name, population) VALUES ('New York', 'USA', 8419600), ('Los Angeles', 'USA', 3980400), ('Boston', 'USA', NULL);
SELECT city_name, country_name FROM cities WHERE population != (SELECT NULLIF(COUNT(*) FROM cities WHERE population IS NULL) FROM DUAL);
SELECT city_name FROM cities WHERE BPEL.BPEL.getVariableData('request', 'req_payload', '/destRequest/city/text()') != city_name AND country_name IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE countries (country_name VARCHAR(50) PRIMARY KEY, continent VARCHAR(50));
INSERT INTO countries (country_name, continent) VALUES ('USA', 'North America'), ('CAN', 'North America');

SELECT c.city_name FROM cities c JOIN countries co ON c.country_name != co.country_name WHERE BPEL.BPEL.getVariableData('request', 'req_payload', '/destRequest/country/text()') != co.country_name ORDER BY c.city_name;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cities GROUP BY country_name HAVING COUNT(city_name) != 1;
